 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import type NDK from "@nostr-dev-kit/ndk";
     2	import {
     3	    type Hexpubkey,
     4	    isValidPubkey,
     5	    type NDKEvent,
     6	    NDKKind,
     7	    NDKRelayList,
     8	    type NDKSigner,
     9	    type NDKUser,
    10	} from "@nostr-dev-kit/ndk";
    11	import { createStore } from "zustand/vanilla";
    12	import type { NDKSession, SessionStartOptions, SessionState } from "./types";
    13	import { NDKNotInitializedError, SessionNotFoundError } from "./utils/errors";
    14	
    15	/**
    16	 * Normalize monitor array into kinds and constructor map
    17	 */
    18	function normalizeMonitor(monitor?: import("./types").MonitorItem[]): {
    19	    kinds: NDKKind[];
    20	    constructorMap: Map<NDKKind, import("./types").NDKEventConstructor>;
    21	} {
    22	    const kinds: NDKKind[] = [];
    23	    const constructorMap = new Map<NDKKind, import("./types").NDKEventConstructor>();
    24	
    25	    if (!monitor || monitor.length === 0) {
    26	        return { kinds, constructorMap };
    27	    }
    28	
    29	    for (const item of monitor) {
    30	        if (typeof item === "number") {
    31	            // Raw NDKKind
    32	            kinds.push(item);
    33	        } else if (item.kinds && Array.isArray(item.kinds)) {
    34	            // NDKEventConstructor
    35	            for (const kind of item.kinds) {
    36	                kinds.push(kind);
    37	                constructorMap.set(kind, item);
    38	            }
    39	        }
    40	    }
    41	
    42	    return { kinds, constructorMap };
    43	}
    44	
    45	export interface SessionStoreActions {
    46	    /**
    47	     * Initialize the store with an NDK instance
    48	     */
    49	    init: (ndk: NDK) => void;
    50	
    51	    /**
    52	     * Add a session for a user or signer
    53	     */
    54	    addSession: (userOrSigner: NDKUser | NDKSigner, setActive: boolean) => Promise<Hexpubkey>;
    55	
    56	    /**
    57	     * Start fetching data for a session
    58	     */
    59	    startSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey, opts: SessionStartOptions) => void;
    60	
    61	    /**
    62	     * Stop fetching data for a session
    63	     */
    64	    stopSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey) => void;
    65	
    66	    /**
    67	     * Add monitors to the active session
    68	     */
    69	    addMonitor: (monitor: import("./types").MonitorItem[]) => void;
    70	
    71	    /**
    72	     * Switch to a different session
    73	     */
    74	    switchToUser: (pubkey: Hexpubkey | null) => Promise<void>;
    75	
    76	    /**
    77	     * Remove a session
    78	     */
    79	    removeSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey) => void;
    80	
    81	    /**
    82	     * Update session data
    83	     */
    84	    updateSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey, data: Partial<NDKSession>) => void;
    85	
    86	    /**
    87	     * Update session preferences
    88	     */
    89	    updatePreferences: (pubkey: Hexpubkey, preferences: Partial<import("./types").SessionPreferences>) => void;
    90	}
    91	
    92	export type SessionStore = SessionState & SessionStoreActions;
    93	
    94	/**
    95	 * Create a session store
    96	 */
    97	export function createSessionStore() {
    98	    return createStore<SessionStore>((set, get) => ({
    99	        sessions: new Map(),
   100	        signers: new Map(),
   101	        activePubkey: undefined,
   102	
   103	        init: (ndk: NDK) => {
   104	            set({ ndk });
   105	        },
   106	
   107	        addSession: async (userOrSigner: NDKUser | NDKSigner, setActive: boolean): Promise<Hexpubkey> => {
   108	            const state = get();
   109	            let user: NDKUser;
   110	            let signer: NDKSigner | undefined;
   111	
   112	            // Check if it's a signer
   113	            if ("user" in userOrSigner && typeof userOrSigner.user === "function") {
   114	                signer = userOrSigner as NDKSigner;
   115	                user = await signer.user();
   116	            } else {
   117	                user = userOrSigner as NDKUser;
   118	            }
   119	
   120	            const pubkey = user.pubkey;
   121	
   122	            // Create or update session
   123	            const existingSession = state.sessions.get(pubkey);
   124	            const session: NDKSession = existingSession || {
   125	                pubkey,
   126	                events: new Map(),
   127	                subscriptions: [],
   128	                lastActive: setActive ? Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) : 0,
   129	            };
   130	
   131	            // Update maps
   132	            const newSessions = new Map(state.sessions);
   133	            newSessions.set(pubkey, session);
   134	
   135	            const updates: Partial<SessionState> = { sessions: newSessions };
   136	
   137	            if (signer) {
   138	                const newSigners = new Map(state.signers);
   139	                newSigners.set(pubkey, signer);
   140	                updates.signers = newSigners;
   141	            }
   142	
   143	            if (setActive) {
   144	                updates.activePubkey = pubkey;
   145	                if (state.ndk && signer) {
   146	                    state.ndk.signer = signer;
   147	                    // Explicitly set activeUser to ensure immediate synchronization
   148	                    user.ndk = state.ndk;
   149	                    state.ndk.activeUser = user;
   150	                }
   151	            }
   152	
   153	            set(updates);
   154	            return pubkey;
   155	        },
   156	
   157	        startSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey, opts: SessionStartOptions) => {
   158	            const state = get();
   159	            const { ndk, sessions } = state;
   160	
   161	            if (!ndk) {
   162	                throw new NDKNotInitializedError();
   163	            }
   164	
   165	            const session = sessions.get(pubkey);
   166	            if (!session) {
   167	                throw new SessionNotFoundError(pubkey);
   168	            }
   169	
   170	            // Stop existing subscriptions if any
   171	            for (const sub of session.subscriptions) {
   172	                sub.stop();
   173	            }
   174	
   175	            // Normalize monitor items
   176	            const { kinds: monitorKinds, constructorMap } = normalizeMonitor(opts.monitor);
   177	
   178	            // Build subscription kinds
   179	            const kinds = buildSubscriptionKinds(opts, monitorKinds);
   180	            if (kinds.length === 0) {
   181	                return; // Nothing to fetch
   182	            }
   183	
   184	            // Create subscription
   185	            const subscription = ndk.subscribe(
   186	                {
   187	                    kinds,
   188	                    authors: [pubkey],
   189	                },
   190	                { closeOnEose: false, subId: "session" },
   191	                {
   192	                    onEvent: (event) => handleIncomingEvent(event, pubkey, constructorMap, get),
   193	                },
   194	            );
   195	
   196	            // Update session with subscriptions array
   197	            get().updateSession(pubkey, { subscriptions: [subscription] });
   198	        },
   199	
   200	        stopSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey) => {
   201	            const state = get();
   202	            const session = state.sessions.get(pubkey);
   203	
   204	            if (session?.subscriptions) {
   205	                for (const sub of session.subscriptions) {
   206	                    sub.stop();
   207	                }
   208	                get().updateSession(pubkey, { subscriptions: [] });
   209	            }
   210	        },
   211	
   212	        addMonitor: (monitor: import("./types").MonitorItem[]) => {
   213	            const state = get();
   214	            const { ndk, activePubkey } = state;
   215	
   216	            if (!ndk) {
   217	                throw new NDKNotInitializedError();
   218	            }
   219	
   220	            if (!activePubkey) {
   221	                console.warn("No active session to add monitor to");
   222	                return;
   223	            }
   224	
   225	            const session = state.sessions.get(activePubkey);
   226	            if (!session) {
   227	                throw new SessionNotFoundError(activePubkey);
   228	            }
   229	
   230	            // Normalize monitor items
   231	            const { kinds, constructorMap } = normalizeMonitor(monitor);
   232	
   233	            if (kinds.length === 0) {
   234	                return; // Nothing to monitor
   235	            }
   236	
   237	            // Create new subscription for the additional monitors
   238	            const subscription = ndk.subscribe(
   239	                {
   240	                    kinds,
   241	                    authors: [activePubkey],
   242	                },
   243	                { closeOnEose: false },
   244	                {
   245	                    onEvent: (event) => handleIncomingEvent(event, activePubkey, constructorMap, get),
   246	                },
   247	            );
   248	
   249	            // Add subscription to the array
   250	            const updatedSubscriptions = [...session.subscriptions, subscription];
   251	            get().updateSession(activePubkey, { subscriptions: updatedSubscriptions });
   252	        },
   253	
   254	        switchToUser: async (pubkey: Hexpubkey | null) => {
   255	            const state = get();
   256	
   257	            if (pubkey === null) {
   258	                if (state.ndk) {
   259	                    state.ndk.signer = undefined;
   260	                    state.ndk.activeUser = undefined;
   261	                    // Clear filters when no session is active
   262	                    state.ndk.muteFilter = undefined;
   263	                    state.ndk.relayConnectionFilter = undefined;
   264	                }
   265	                set({ activePubkey: undefined });
   266	                return;
   267	            }
   268	
   269	            const session = state.sessions.get(pubkey);
   270	            if (!session) {
   271	                throw new SessionNotFoundError(pubkey);
   272	            }
   273	
   274	            const signer = state.signers.get(pubkey);
   275	
   276	            // Update session last active time
   277	            get().updateSession(pubkey, { lastActive: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) });
   278	
   279	            // Update NDK signer BEFORE setting activePubkey
   280	            // This prevents race conditions where reactive code runs before signer is ready
   281	            if (state.ndk) {
   282	                state.ndk.signer = signer;
   283	
   284	                // Set muteFilter based on session's mute data
   285	                if (session.muteSet || session.mutedWords) {
   286	                    state.ndk.muteFilter = (event) => {
   287	                        // Check if author is muted
   288	                        if (session.muteSet?.has(event.pubkey)) return true;
   289	
   290	                        // Check if event ID is muted
   291	                        if (event.id && session.muteSet?.has(event.id)) return true;
   292	
   293	                        // Check if content contains muted words
   294	                        if (event.content && session.mutedWords && session.mutedWords.size > 0) {
   295	                            const lowerContent = event.content.toLowerCase();
   296	                            for (const word of session.mutedWords) {
   297	                                if (lowerContent.includes(word)) return true;
   298	                            }
   299	                        }
   300	
   301	                        return false;
   302	                    };
   303	                } else {
   304	                    state.ndk.muteFilter = undefined;
   305	                }
   306	
   307	                // Set relayConnectionFilter based on session's blocked relays
   308	                if (session.blockedRelays && session.blockedRelays.size > 0) {
   309	                    const blockedRelays = session.blockedRelays;
   310	                    state.ndk.relayConnectionFilter = (relayUrl) => {
   311	                        // Block connection if relay is in blockedRelays
   312	                        return !blockedRelays.has(relayUrl);
   313	                    };
   314	                } else {
   315	                    state.ndk.relayConnectionFilter = undefined;
   316	                }
   317	            }
   318	
   319	            // Switch active session AFTER signer is set
   320	            set({ activePubkey: pubkey });
   321	
   322	            // Explicitly set activeUser to ensure immediate synchronization (async)
   323	            // The signer setter also does this but we do it explicitly here too
   324	            if (state.ndk && signer) {
   325	                const user = await signer.user();
   326	                user.ndk = state.ndk;
   327	                state.ndk.activeUser = user;
   328	            }
   329	        },
   330	
   331	        removeSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey) => {
   332	            const state = get();
   333	
   334	            // Remove from maps
   335	            const newSessions = new Map(state.sessions);
   336	            const newSigners = new Map(state.signers);
   337	            newSessions.delete(pubkey);
   338	            newSigners.delete(pubkey);
   339	
   340	            const updates: Partial<SessionState> = {
   341	                sessions: newSessions,
   342	                signers: newSigners,
   343	            };
   344	
   345	            // If this was the active session, clear NDK state BEFORE triggering subscriptions
   346	            // This prevents race conditions where subscription handlers try to re-set the signer
   347	            if (state.activePubkey === pubkey) {
   348	                const remainingSessions = Array.from(newSessions.keys());
   349	
   350	                if (remainingSessions.length === 0) {
   351	                    // No sessions left, clear NDK state immediately
   352	                    updates.activePubkey = undefined;
   353	
   354	                    if (state.ndk) {
   355	                        // Clear NDK state directly to prevent async side effects
   356	                        state.ndk.signer = undefined;
   357	                        state.ndk.activeUser = undefined;
   358	                        state.ndk.muteFilter = undefined;
   359	                        state.ndk.relayConnectionFilter = undefined;
   360	                    }
   361	                }
   362	            }
   363	
   364	            // Apply the session removal (triggers subscriptions)
   365	            set(updates);
   366	
   367	            // Stop subscription after state is updated
   368	            get().stopSession(pubkey);
   369	
   370	            // After removing, switch to another session if needed
   371	            if (state.activePubkey === pubkey) {
   372	                const remainingSessions = Array.from(newSessions.keys());
   373	                if (remainingSessions.length > 0) {
   374	                    // Switch to the next available session (fire-and-forget)
   375	                    get()
   376	                        .switchToUser(remainingSessions[0])
   377	                        .catch((error) => {
   378	                            console.error("Failed to switch session after removal:", error);
   379	                        });
   380	                }
   381	            }
   382	        },
   383	
   384	        updateSession: (pubkey: Hexpubkey, data: Partial<NDKSession>) => {
   385	            const state = get();
   386	            const session = state.sessions.get(pubkey);
   387	
   388	            if (!session) {
   389	                return;
   390	            }
   391	
   392	            const updatedSession = { ...session, ...data };
   393	            const newSessions = new Map(state.sessions);
   394	            newSessions.set(pubkey, updatedSession);
   395	
   396	            set({ sessions: newSessions });
   397	        },
   398	
   399	        updatePreferences: (pubkey: Hexpubkey, preferences: Partial<import("./types").SessionPreferences>) => {
   400	            const state = get();
   401	            const session = state.sessions.get(pubkey);
   402	
   403	            if (!session) {
   404	                return;
   405	            }
   406	
   407	            const updatedPreferences = { ...session.preferences, ...preferences };
   408	            get().updateSession(pubkey, { preferences: updatedPreferences });
   409	        },
   410	    }));
   411	}
   412	
   413	/**
   414	 * Build subscription kinds array based on session options.
   415	 * Centralizes the logic for determining which event kinds to subscribe to.
   416	 */
   417	function buildSubscriptionKinds(opts: SessionStartOptions, monitorKinds: NDKKind[]): NDKKind[] {
   418	    const kinds: NDKKind[] = [];
   419	
   420	    if (opts.follows) {
   421	        kinds.push(NDKKind.Contacts); // Contact list
   422	    }
   423	
   424	    if (opts.mutes) {
   425	        kinds.push(NDKKind.MuteList); // Mute list
   426	    }
   427	
   428	    if (opts.blockedRelays) {
   429	        kinds.push(NDKKind.BlockRelayList); // Block relay list
   430	    }
   431	
   432	    if (opts.relayList) {
   433	        kinds.push(NDKKind.RelayList); // User relay list
   434	    }
   435	
   436	    if (opts.wallet) {
   437	        kinds.push(NDKKind.CashuWallet, NDKKind.CashuMintList); // NIP-60 wallet
   438	    }
   439	
   440	    // Add monitor kinds
   441	    kinds.push(...monitorKinds);
   442	
   443	    return kinds;
   444	}
   445	
   446	/**
   447	 * Handle incoming event from subscription.
   448	 * Processes follows, mutes, and other events appropriately.
   449	 */
   450	function handleIncomingEvent(
   451	    event: NDKEvent,
   452	    pubkey: Hexpubkey,
   453	    constructorMap: Map<NDKKind, import("./types").NDKEventConstructor>,
   454	    getState: () => SessionStore,
   455	): void {
   456	    const currentSession = getState().sessions.get(pubkey);
   457	    if (!currentSession) {
   458	        return;
   459	    }
   460	
   461	    // Process contact list
   462	    if (event.kind === NDKKind.Contacts) {
   463	        handleContactListEvent(event, pubkey, getState);
   464	        return;
   465	    }
   466	
   467	    // Process mute list
   468	    if (event.kind === NDKKind.MuteList) {
   469	        handleMuteListEvent(event, pubkey, getState);
   470	        return;
   471	    }
   472	
   473	    // Process block relay list
   474	    if (event.kind === NDKKind.BlockRelayList) {
   475	        handleBlockRelayListEvent(event, pubkey, getState);
   476	        return;
   477	    }
   478	
   479	    // Process user relay list
   480	    if (event.kind === NDKKind.RelayList) {
   481	        handleRelayListEvent(event, pubkey, getState);
   482	        return;
   483	    }
   484	
   485	    // Store other replaceable events
   486	    handleReplaceableEvent(event, currentSession, pubkey, constructorMap, getState);
   487	}
   488	
   489	/**
   490	 * Process contact list event
   491	 */
   492	function handleContactListEvent(event: NDKEvent, pubkey: Hexpubkey, getState: () => SessionStore): void {
   493	    const session = getState().sessions.get(pubkey);
   494	    if (!session || event.kind === undefined) return;
   495	
   496	    const existingEvent = session.events.get(event.kind);
   497	    if (existingEvent) {
   498	        if (existingEvent.id === event.id) return;
   499	        if ((existingEvent.created_at ?? 0) > (event.created_at ?? 0)) return;
   500	    }
   501	
   502	    const followSet = new Set<Hexpubkey>();
   503	    for (const tag of event.tags) {
   504	        if (tag[0] === "p" && tag[1] && isValidPubkey(tag[1])) {
   505	            followSet.add(tag[1]);
   506	        }
   507	    }
   508	
   509	    // Update both followSet and store the event
   510	    session.events.set(event.kind, event);
   511	    getState().updateSession(pubkey, { followSet, events: new Map(session.events) });
   512	}
   513	
   514	/**
   515	 * Process mute list event (kind 10000)
   516	 */
   517	function handleMuteListEvent(event: NDKEvent, pubkey: Hexpubkey, getState: () => SessionStore): void {
   518	    const session = getState().sessions.get(pubkey);
   519	    if (!session || event.kind === undefined) return;
   520	
   521	    const existingEvent = session.events.get(event.kind);
   522	    if (existingEvent) {
   523	        if (existingEvent.id === event.id) return;
   524	        if ((existingEvent.created_at ?? 0) > (event.created_at ?? 0)) return;
   525	    }
   526	
   527	    const muteSet = new Map<string, string>();
   528	    const mutedWords = new Set<string>();
   529	
   530	    for (const tag of event.tags) {
   531	        // Handle muted pubkeys and events
   532	        if ((tag[0] === "p" || tag[0] === "e") && tag[1]) {
   533	            muteSet.set(tag[1], tag[0]);
   534	        }
   535	        // Handle muted words
   536	        if (tag[0] === "word" && tag[1]) {
   537	            mutedWords.add(tag[1].toLowerCase());
   538	        }
   539	    }
   540	
   541	    // Update both mute data and store the event
   542	    session.events.set(event.kind, event);
   543	    getState().updateSession(pubkey, { muteSet, mutedWords, events: new Map(session.events) });
   544	}
   545	
   546	/**
   547	 * Process block relay list event (kind 10001)
   548	 */
   549	function handleBlockRelayListEvent(event: NDKEvent, pubkey: Hexpubkey, getState: () => SessionStore): void {
   550	    const session = getState().sessions.get(pubkey);
   551	    if (!session || event.kind === undefined) return;
   552	
   553	    const existingEvent = session.events.get(event.kind);
   554	    if (existingEvent) {
   555	        if (existingEvent.id === event.id) return;
   556	        if ((existingEvent.created_at ?? 0) > (event.created_at ?? 0)) return;
   557	    }
   558	
   559	    const blockedRelays = new Set<string>();
   560	
   561	    for (const tag of event.tags) {
   562	        if (tag[0] === "relay" && tag[1]) {
   563	            blockedRelays.add(tag[1]);
   564	        }
   565	    }
   566	
   567	    // Update both blockedRelays and store the event
   568	    session.events.set(event.kind, event);
   569	    getState().updateSession(pubkey, { blockedRelays, events: new Map(session.events) });
   570	}
   571	
   572	/**
   573	 * Process user relay list event (kind 10002)
   574	 */
   575	function handleRelayListEvent(event: NDKEvent, pubkey: Hexpubkey, getState: () => SessionStore): void {
   576	    const session = getState().sessions.get(pubkey);
   577	    if (!session || event.kind === undefined) return;
   578	
   579	    const existingEvent = session.events.get(event.kind);
   580	    if (existingEvent) {
   581	        if (existingEvent.id === event.id) return;
   582	        if ((existingEvent.created_at ?? 0) > (event.created_at ?? 0)) return;
   583	    }
   584	
   585	    const relayListEvent = NDKRelayList.from(event);
   586	    const relayList = new Map<string, { read: boolean; write: boolean }>();
   587	
   588	    // Add read-only relays
   589	    for (const url of relayListEvent.readRelayUrls) {
   590	        relayList.set(url, { read: true, write: false });
   591	    }
   592	
   593	    // Add write-only relays
   594	    for (const url of relayListEvent.writeRelayUrls) {
   595	        const existing = relayList.get(url);
   596	        if (existing) {
   597	            existing.write = true;
   598	        } else {
   599	            relayList.set(url, { read: false, write: true });
   600	        }
   601	    }
   602	
   603	    // Add both read and write relays
   604	    for (const url of relayListEvent.bothRelayUrls) {
   605	        relayList.set(url, { read: true, write: true });
   606	    }
   607	
   608	    // Update both relayList and store the event
   609	    session.events.set(event.kind, event);
   610	    getState().updateSession(pubkey, { relayList, events: new Map(session.events) });
   611	}
   612	
   613	/**
   614	 * Store replaceable event
   615	 */
   616	function handleReplaceableEvent(
   617	    event: NDKEvent,
   618	    session: NDKSession,
   619	    pubkey: Hexpubkey,
   620	    constructorMap: Map<NDKKind, import("./types").NDKEventConstructor>,
   621	    getState: () => SessionStore,
   622	): void {
   623	    if (event.kind === undefined) return;
   624	
   625	    const existingEvent = session.events.get(event.kind);
   626	
   627	    // Skip if we already have this exact event or a newer one
   628	    if (existingEvent) {
   629	        if (existingEvent.id === event.id) {
   630	            return;
   631	        }
   632	        if ((existingEvent.created_at ?? 0) > (event.created_at ?? 0)) {
   633	            return;
   634	        }
   635	    }
   636	
   637	    // Check if there's an event constructor to wrap this event
   638	    const eventConstructor = constructorMap.get(event.kind);
   639	    const wrappedEvent = eventConstructor && typeof eventConstructor.from === "function" ? eventConstructor.from(event) : event;
   640	
   641	    session.events.set(event.kind, wrappedEvent);
   642	    getState().updateSession(pubkey, { events: new Map(session.events) });
   643	}

    37	
    38	    get userSync(): NDKUser;
    39	
    40	    /**

    45	    sign(event: NostrEvent): Promise<string>;
    46	
    47	    /**

    53	    /**

    56	     * @nip Optionally returns an array with single supported nip or empty, to check for truthy or falsy.
    57	     * @return A promised list of any (or none) of these strings  ['nip04', 'nip44']
    58	     */

    61	    /**

    70	    /**

    73	     * @param sender - The sender (pubkey or conversationKey) of the encrypted value
    74	     * @param value - The value to be decrypted
    75	     * @param scheme - which NIP is being implemented ('nip04', 'nip44', 'nip49')
    76	     */
    77	    decrypt(sender: NDKUser, value: string, scheme?: NDKEncryptionScheme): Promise<string>;
    78	
    79	    /**

    83	    toPayload(): string;

    85	
    86	/**
    87	 * Interface for Signer classes that support static deserialization

    89	export interface NDKSignerStatic<T extends NDKSigner> {

    91	     * Deserializes the signer from a payload string.

    94	     * @returns An instance of the specific signer class.
    95	     */
    96	    fromPayload(payload: string, ndk?: NDK): Promise<T>;

     7	export const signerRegistry: Map<string, NDKSignerStatic<NDKSigner>> = new Map();

    11	 */
    12	export function registerSigner(type: string, signerClass: NDKSignerStatic<NDKSigner>): void {

     1	import { bytesToHex, hexToBytes } from "@noble/hashes/utils.js";
     2	import type { UnsignedEvent } from "nostr-tools";
     3	import { finalizeEvent, generateSecretKey, getPublicKey, nip04, nip19, nip44 } from "nostr-tools";
     4	import * as nip49 from "nostr-tools/nip49";
     5	import type { NostrEvent } from "../../events/index.js";
     6	import type { NDK } from "../../ndk/index.js";
     7	import type { NDKEncryptionScheme } from "../../types.js";
     8	import { NDKUser } from "../../user";
     9	import type { NDKSigner } from "../index.js";
    10	import { registerSigner } from "../registry.js";
    11	
    12	/**
    13	 * A signer that uses an in-memory private key (nsec).
    14	 *
    15	 * @example
    16	 * ```ts
    17	 * const signer = NDKPrivateKeySigner.generate();
    18	 * console.log('your nsec is', signer.nsec);
    19	 * console.log('your pubkey is', signer.pubkey);
    20	 * console.log('your npub is', signer.npub);
    21	 * ```
    22	 *
    23	 * @example
    24	 * ```ts
    25	 * const signer = new NDKPrivateKeySigner(nsec);
    26	 * ```
    27	 */
    28	export class NDKPrivateKeySigner implements NDKSigner {
    29	    private _user: NDKUser;
    30	    private _privateKey: Uint8Array;
    31	    private _pubkey?: string;
    32	
    33	    /**
    34	     * Create a new signer from a private key.
    35	     * @param privateKey - The private key to use in hex form or nsec.
    36	     * @param ndk - The NDK instance to use.
    37	     *
    38	     * @ai-guardrail
    39	     * If you have an nsec (bech32-encoded private key starting with "nsec1"), you can pass it directly
    40	     * to this constructor without decoding it first. The constructor handles both hex and nsec formats automatically.
    41	     * DO NOT use nip19.decode() to convert nsec to hex before passing it here - just pass the nsec string directly.
    42	     */
    43	    public constructor(privateKeyOrNsec: Uint8Array | string, ndk?: NDK) {
    44	        // If it's a string, it can be either a hex encoded private key or an nsec.
    45	        if (typeof privateKeyOrNsec === "string") {
    46	            // If it's an nsec, try and decode
    47	            if (privateKeyOrNsec.startsWith("nsec1")) {
    48	                const { type, data } = nip19.decode(privateKeyOrNsec);
    49	                if (type === "nsec") this._privateKey = data;
    50	                else throw new Error("Invalid private key provided.");
    51	            } else if (privateKeyOrNsec.length === 64) {
    52	                this._privateKey = hexToBytes(privateKeyOrNsec);
    53	            } else {
    54	                throw new Error("Invalid private key provided.");
    55	            }
    56	        } else {
    57	            this._privateKey = privateKeyOrNsec as Uint8Array;
    58	        }
    59	
    60	        this._pubkey = getPublicKey(this._privateKey);
    61	        if (ndk) this._user = ndk.getUser({ pubkey: this._pubkey });
    62	        this._user ??= new NDKUser({ pubkey: this._pubkey });
    63	    }
    64	
    65	    /**
    66	     * Get the private key in hex form.
    67	     */
    68	    get privateKey(): string {
    69	        if (!this._privateKey) throw new Error("Not ready");
    70	        return bytesToHex(this._privateKey);
    71	    }
    72	
    73	    /**
    74	     * Get the public key in hex form.
    75	     */
    76	    get pubkey(): string {
    77	        if (!this._pubkey) throw new Error("Not ready");
    78	        return this._pubkey;
    79	    }
    80	
    81	    /**
    82	     * Get the private key in nsec form.
    83	     */
    84	    get nsec(): string {
    85	        if (!this._privateKey) throw new Error("Not ready");
    86	        return nip19.nsecEncode(this._privateKey);
    87	    }
    88	
    89	    /**
    90	     * Get the public key in npub form.
    91	     */
    92	    get npub(): string {
    93	        if (!this._pubkey) throw new Error("Not ready");
    94	        return nip19.npubEncode(this._pubkey);
    95	    }
    96	
    97	    /**
    98	     * Encrypt the private key with a password to ncryptsec format.
    99	     * @param password - The password to encrypt the private key.
   100	     * @param logn - The log2 of the scrypt N parameter (default: 16).
   101	     * @param ksb - The key security byte (0x00, 0x01, or 0x02, default: 0x02).
   102	     * @returns The encrypted private key in ncryptsec format.
   103	     *
   104	     * @example
   105	     * ```ts
   106	     * const signer = new NDKPrivateKeySigner(nsec);
   107	     * const ncryptsec = signer.encryptToNcryptsec("my-password");
   108	     * console.log('encrypted key:', ncryptsec);
   109	     * ```
   110	     */
   111	    public encryptToNcryptsec(password: string, logn: number = 16, ksb: 0x00 | 0x01 | 0x02 = 0x02): string {
   112	        if (!this._privateKey) throw new Error("Private key not available");
   113	        return nip49.encrypt(this._privateKey, password, logn, ksb);
   114	    }
   115	
   116	    /**
   117	     * Generate a new private key.
   118	     */
   119	    public static generate(): NDKPrivateKeySigner {
   120	        const privateKey = generateSecretKey();
   121	        return new NDKPrivateKeySigner(privateKey);
   122	    }
   123	
   124	    /**
   125	     * Create a signer from an encrypted private key (ncryptsec) using a password.
   126	     * @param ncryptsec - The encrypted private key in ncryptsec format.
   127	     * @param password - The password to decrypt the private key.
   128	     * @param ndk - Optional NDK instance.
   129	     * @returns A new NDKPrivateKeySigner instance.
   130	     *
   131	     * @example
   132	     * ```ts
   133	     * const signer = NDKPrivateKeySigner.fromNcryptsec(
   134	     *   "ncryptsec1qgg9947rlpvqu76pj5ecreduf9jxhselq2nae2kghhvd5g7dgjtcxfqtd67p9m0w57lspw8gsq6yphnm8623nsl8xn9j4jdzz84zm3frztj3z7s35vpzmqf6ksu8r89qk5z2zxfmu5gv8th8wclt0h4p",
   135	     *   "my-password"
   136	     * );
   137	     * console.log('your pubkey is', signer.pubkey);
   138	     * ```
   139	     */
   140	    public static fromNcryptsec(ncryptsec: string, password: string, ndk?: NDK): NDKPrivateKeySigner {
   141	        const privateKeyBytes = nip49.decrypt(ncryptsec, password);
   142	        return new NDKPrivateKeySigner(privateKeyBytes, ndk);
   143	    }
   144	
   145	    /**
   146	     * Noop in NDKPrivateKeySigner.
   147	     */
   148	    public async blockUntilReady(): Promise<NDKUser> {
   149	        return this._user;
   150	    }
   151	
   152	    /**
   153	     * Get the user.
   154	     */
   155	    public async user(): Promise<NDKUser> {
   156	        return this._user;
   157	    }
   158	
   159	    /**
   160	     * Get the user.
   161	     */
   162	    public get userSync(): NDKUser {
   163	        return this._user;
   164	    }
   165	
   166	    public async sign(event: NostrEvent): Promise<string> {
   167	        if (!this._privateKey) {
   168	            throw Error("Attempted to sign without a private key");
   169	        }
   170	
   171	        return finalizeEvent(event as UnsignedEvent, this._privateKey).sig;
   172	    }
   173	
   174	    public async encryptionEnabled(scheme?: NDKEncryptionScheme): Promise<NDKEncryptionScheme[]> {
   175	        const enabled: NDKEncryptionScheme[] = [];
   176	        if (!scheme || scheme === "nip04") enabled.push("nip04");
   177	        if (!scheme || scheme === "nip44") enabled.push("nip44");
   178	        return enabled;
   179	    }
   180	
   181	    public async encrypt(recipient: NDKUser, value: string, scheme?: NDKEncryptionScheme): Promise<string> {
   182	        if (!this._privateKey || !this.privateKey) {
   183	            throw Error("Attempted to encrypt without a private key");
   184	        }
   185	
   186	        const recipientHexPubKey = recipient.pubkey;
   187	        if (scheme === "nip44") {
   188	            const conversationKey = nip44.v2.utils.getConversationKey(this._privateKey, recipientHexPubKey);
   189	            return await nip44.v2.encrypt(value, conversationKey);
   190	        }
   191	        return await nip04.encrypt(this._privateKey, recipientHexPubKey, value);
   192	    }
   193	
   194	    public async decrypt(sender: NDKUser, value: string, scheme?: NDKEncryptionScheme): Promise<string> {
   195	        if (!this._privateKey || !this.privateKey) {
   196	            throw Error("Attempted to decrypt without a private key");
   197	        }
   198	
   199	        const senderHexPubKey = sender.pubkey;
   200	        if (scheme === "nip44") {
   201	            const conversationKey = nip44.v2.utils.getConversationKey(this._privateKey, senderHexPubKey);
   202	            return await nip44.v2.decrypt(value, conversationKey);
   203	        }
   204	        return await nip04.decrypt(this._privateKey, senderHexPubKey, value);
   205	    }
   206	
   207	    /**
   208	     * Serializes the signer's private key into a storable format.
   209	     * @returns A JSON string containing the type and the hex private key.
   210	     */
   211	    public toPayload(): string {
   212	        if (!this._privateKey) throw new Error("Private key not available");
   213	        const payload = {
   214	            type: "private-key",
   215	            payload: this.privateKey, // Use the hex private key
   216	        };
   217	        return JSON.stringify(payload);
   218	    }
   219	
   220	    /**

   226	    public static async fromPayload(payloadString: string, ndk?: NDK): Promise<NDKPrivateKeySigner> {
   227	        const payload = JSON.parse(payloadString);
   228	
   229	        if (payload.type !== "private-key") {
   230	            throw new Error(`Invalid payload type: expected 'private-key', got ${payload.type}`);
   231	        }
   232	
   233	        if (!payload.payload || typeof payload.payload !== "string") {
   234	            throw new Error("Invalid payload content for private-key signer");
   235	        }
   236	
   237	        return new NDKPrivateKeySigner(payload.payload, ndk);
   238	    }
   239	}
   240	
   241	registerSigner("private-key", NDKPrivateKeySigner);

    28	/**

    45	    public constructor(waitTimeout = 1000, ndk?: NDK) {

    47	        this.waitTimeout = waitTimeout;

    49	    }

    56	    public async blockUntilReady(): Promise<NDKUser> {
    57	        await this.waitForExtension();
    58	
    59	        const pubkey = await window.nostr?.getPublicKey();
    60	
    61	        // If the user rejects granting access, error out
    62	        if (!pubkey) {
    63	            throw new Error("User rejected access");
    64	        }
    65	
    66	        this._pubkey = pubkey;
    67	        let user: NDKUser;

    71	
    72	        return user;
    73	    }
    74	
    75	    /**

    79	    public async user(): Promise<NDKUser> {

    83	
    84	        return this._userPromise;

    86

    91	
    92	    /**

    97	     */
    98	    public async sign(event: NostrEvent): Promise<string> {
    99	        await this.waitForExtension();

   105	
   106	    public async relays(ndk: NDK): Promise<NDKRelay[]> {

   119	    }
   120	
   121	    public async encryptionEnabled(nip?: NDKEncryptionScheme): Promise<NDKEncryptionScheme[]> {
   122	        const enabled: NDKEncryptionScheme[] = [];

   124	        if ((!nip || nip === "nip04") && Boolean(window.nostr?.nip04)) enabled.push("nip04");
   125	        if ((!nip || nip === "nip44") && Boolean(window.nostr?.nip44)) enabled.push("nip44");
   126	        return enabled;
   127	    }
   128	
   129	    public async encrypt(recipient: NDKUser, value: string, nip: NDKEncryptionScheme = "nip04"): Promise<string> {
   130	        if (!(await this.encryptionEnabled(nip)))
   131	            throw new Error(`${nip}encryption is not available from your browser extension`);
   132	        await this.waitForExtension();
   133	
   134	        const recipientHexPubKey = recipient.pubkey;
   135	        return this.queueEncryption(nip, "encrypt", recipientHexPubKey, value);
   136	    }
   137	
   138	    public async decrypt(sender: NDKUser, value: string, nip: NDKEncryptionScheme = "nip04"): Promise<string> {
   139	        if (!(await this.encryptionEnabled(nip)))
   140	            throw new Error(`${nip}encryption is not available from your browser extension`);
   141	        await this.waitForExtension();
   142	
   143	        const senderHexPubKey = sender.pubkey;
   144	        return this.queueEncryption(nip, "decrypt", senderHexPubKey, value);
   145	    }
   146	
   147	    private async queueEncryption(
   148	        scheme: NDKEncryptionScheme,
   149	        method: EncryptionMethod,
   150	        counterpartyHexpubkey: string,
   151	        value: string,
   152	    ): Promise<string> {
   153	        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
   154	            this.encryptionQueue.push({
   155	                scheme,
   156	                method,
   157	                counterpartyHexpubkey,
   158	                value,
   159	                resolve,
   160	                reject,
   161	            });
   162	
   163	            if (!this.encryptionProcessing) {
   164	                this.processEncryptionQueue();
   165	            }
   166	        });
   167	    }
   168	
   169	    private async processEncryptionQueue(item?: EncryptionQueueItem, retries = 0): Promise<void> {
   170	        if (!item && this.encryptionQueue.length === 0) {
   171	            this.encryptionProcessing = false;
   172	            return;
   173	        }
   174	
   175	        this.encryptionProcessing = true;
   176	        const currentItem = item || this.encryptionQueue.shift();
   177	
   178	        if (!currentItem) {
   179	            this.encryptionProcessing = false;
   180	            return;
   181	        }
   182	
   183	        const { scheme, method, counterpartyHexpubkey, value, resolve, reject } = currentItem;
   184	
   185	        this.debug("Processing encryption queue item", {
   186	            method,
   187	            counterpartyHexpubkey,
   188	            value,
   189	        });
   190	
   191	        try {
   192	            const result = await window.nostr?.[scheme]?.[method](counterpartyHexpubkey, value);
   193	            if (!result) throw new Error("Failed to encrypt/decrypt");
   194	            resolve(result);
   195	        } catch (error: unknown) {
   196	            // Check if error is an instance of Error before accessing message
   197	            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
   198	
   199	            // Retry a few times if the call is already executing
   200	            if (errorMessage.includes("call already executing") && retries < 5) {
   201	                this.debug("Retrying encryption queue item", {
   202	                    method,
   203	                    counterpartyHexpubkey,
   204	                    value,
   205	                    retries,
   206	                });
   207	                setTimeout(() => {
   208	                    // Pass currentItem to avoid potential issues if item was undefined
   209	                    this.processEncryptionQueue(currentItem, retries + 1);
   210	                }, 50 * retries);
   211	
   212	                return; // Exit after scheduling retry
   213	            }
   214	
   215	            // Ensure we reject with an Error object for other errors
   216	            reject(error instanceof Error ? error : new Error(errorMessage));
   217	        }
   218	
   219	        this.processEncryptionQueue();
   220	    }
   221	
   222	    private waitForExtension(): Promise<void> {
   223	        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
   224	            if (window.nostr) {
   225	                resolve();
   226	                return;
   227	            }
   228	
   229	            let timerId: NodeJS.Timeout | number | undefined; // Use let and allow undefined
   230	
   231	            // Create an interval to repeatedly check for window.nostr
   232	            const intervalId = setInterval(() => {
   233	                if (window.nostr) {
   234	                    clearTimeout(timerId as number);
   235	                    clearInterval(intervalId);
   236	                    resolve();
   237	                }
   238	            }, 100);
   239	
   240	            // Set a timer to reject the promise if window.nostr is not available within the timeout
   241	            timerId = setTimeout(() => {
   242	                clearInterval(intervalId);
   243	                reject(new Error("NIP-07 extension not available"));
   244	            }, this.waitTimeout);
   245	        });
   246	    }
   247	
   248	    /**
   249	     * Serializes the signer type into a storable format.
   250	     * NIP-07 signers don't have persistent state to serialize beyond their type.
   251	     * @returns A JSON string containing the type.
   252	     */
   253	    public toPayload(): string {
   254	        const payload = {
   255	            type: "nip07",
   256	            payload: "", // No specific payload needed for NIP-07
   257	        };
   258	        return JSON.stringify(payload);
   259	    }
   260	
   261	    /**

   267	     */
   268	    public static async fromPayload(payloadString: string, ndk?: NDK): Promise<NDKNip07Signer> {
   269	        const payload = JSON.parse(payloadString);
   270	
   271	        if (payload.type !== "nip07") {
   272	            throw new Error(`Invalid payload type: expected 'nip07', got ${payload.type}`);
   273	        }
   274	
   275	        // NIP-07 doesn't need data from the payload, just create a new instance.
   276	        // We might want to pass constructor args if they were stored, but they aren't here.
   277	        return new NDKNip07Signer(undefined, ndk);
   278	    }
   279	}

   314	
   315	    public async blockUntilReady(): Promise<NDKUser> {
   316	        // Ensure bunkerPubkey is set before any logic
   317	        if (!this.bunkerPubkey && !this.nostrConnectSecret && !this.nip05) {
   318	            throw new Error("Bunker pubkey not set");
   319	        }
   320	
   321	        if (this.nostrConnectSecret) return this.blockUntilReadyNostrConnect();
   322	
   323	        if (this.nip05 && !this.userPubkey) {
   324	            const user = await NDKUser.fromNip05(this.nip05, this.ndk);
   325	
   326	            if (user) {
   327	                this._user = user;
   328	                this.userPubkey = user.pubkey;
   329	                this.relayUrls = user.nip46Urls;
   330	                this.rpc = new NDKNostrRpc(this.ndk, this.localSigner, this.debug, this.relayUrls);
   331	            }
   332	        }
   333	
   334	        if (!this.bunkerPubkey && this.userPubkey) {
   335	            this.bunkerPubkey = this.userPubkey;
   336	        } else if (!this.bunkerPubkey) {
   337	            throw new Error("Bunker pubkey not set");
   338	        }
   339	
   340	        await this.startListening();
   341	
   342	        this.rpc.on("authUrl", (...props) => {
   343	            this.emit("authUrl", ...props);
   344	        });
   345	
   346	        const promise = new Promise<NDKUser>((resolve, reject) => {
   347	            const connectParams = [this.userPubkey ?? ""];
   348	
   349	            if (this.secret) connectParams.push(this.secret);
   350	
   351	            if (!this.bunkerPubkey) throw new Error("Bunker pubkey not set");
   352	
   353	            this.rpc.sendRequest(this.bunkerPubkey, "connect", connectParams, 24133, (response: NDKRpcResponse) => {
   354	                if (response.result === "ack") {
   355	                    this.getPublicKey().then(async (pubkey) => {
   356	                        this.userPubkey = pubkey;
   357	                        this._user = this.ndk.getUser({ pubkey });
   358	                        await this.switchRelays();
   359	                        resolve(this._user);
   360	                    }).catch(reject);
   361	                } else {
   362	                    reject(response.error);
   363	                }
   364	            });
   365	        });
   366	
   367	        return this.withTimeout(promise, "blockUntilReady");
   368	    }
   369	
   370	    /**
   371	     * Sends a switch_relays request to the bunker.
   372	     * If the bunker responds with new relay URLs, updates the RPC layer
   373	     * and resubscribes on the new relays.
   374	     */
   375	    private async switchRelays(): Promise<void> {
   376	        if (!this.bunkerPubkey) return;
   377	
   378	        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
   379	            // Timeout in case the bunker doesn't support switch_relays
   380	            const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
   381	                this.debug("switch_relays timed out, bunker may not support it");
   382	                resolve();
   383	            }, 5000);
   384	
   385	            this.rpc.sendRequest(this.bunkerPubkey!, "switch_relays", [], 24133, async (response: NDKRpcResponse) => {
   386	                clearTimeout(timeout);
   387	
   388	                if (response.error || !response.result || response.result === "null") {
   389	                    this.debug("switch_relays: no relay change needed");
   390	                    resolve();
   391	                    return;
   392	                }
   393	
   394	                try {
   395	                    const newRelays: string[] = JSON.parse(response.result);
   396	                    if (Array.isArray(newRelays) && newRelays.length > 0) {
   397	                        this.debug("switching relays to %o", newRelays);
   398	                        this.relayUrls = newRelays;
   399	                        this.rpc.updateRelays(newRelays);
   400	                        this.subscription?.stop();
   401	                        this.subscription = undefined;
   402	                        await this.startListening();
   403	                    }
   404	                } catch (e) {
   405	                    this.debug("error parsing switch_relays response", e);
   406	                }
   407	
   408	                resolve();
   409	            });
   410	        });
   411	    }
   412	
   413	    public stop() {
   414	        this.subscription?.stop();
   415	        this.subscription = undefined;
   416	    }
   417	
   418	    public async getPublicKey(): Promise<Hexpubkey> {
   419	        if (this.userPubkey) return this.userPubkey;
   420	
   421	        const promise = new Promise<Hexpubkey>((resolve, _reject) => {
   422	            if (!this.bunkerPubkey) throw new Error("Bunker pubkey not set");
   423	
   424	            this.rpc.sendRequest(this.bunkerPubkey, "get_public_key", [], 24133, (response: NDKRpcResponse) => {
   425	                resolve(response.result);
   426	            });
   427	        });
   428	
   429	        return this.withTimeout(promise, "getPublicKey");
   430	    }

    18	/**
    19	 * Error thrown when a NIP-46 remote signer operation times out.
    20	 */
    21	export class NDKNip46TimeoutError extends Error {
    22	    /** The operation that timed out (e.g. "sign", "encrypt", "blockUntilReady") */

    24	    /** The timeout duration in milliseconds */
    25	    public readonly timeoutMs: number;

    27	    constructor(operation: string, timeoutMs: number) {

    29	        this.name = "NDKNip46TimeoutError";
    30	        this.operation = operation;
    31	        this.timeoutMs = timeoutMs;
    32	    }
    33	}
    34	
    35	/**
    36	 * This NDKSigner implements NIP-46, which allows remote signing of events.
    37	 * This class is meant to be used client-side, paired with the NDKNip46Backend or a NIP-46 backend (like Nostr-Connect)
    38	 *
    39	 * @emits authUrl -- Emitted when the user should take an action in certain URL.
    40	 *                   When a client receives this event, it should direct the user
    41	 *                   to go to that URL to authorize the application.
    42	 *
    43	 * @example
    44	 * const ndk = new NDK()
    45	 * const nip05 = await prompt("enter your scheme-05") // Get a NIP-05 the user wants to login with
    46	 * const privateKey = localStorage.getItem("nip46-local-key") // If we have a private key previously saved, use it
    47	 * const signer = NDKNip46Signer.bunker(ndk, nip05, privateKey) // Create a signer with (or without) a private key
    48	 *
    49	 * // Save generated private key for future use
    50	 * localStorage.setItem("nip46-local-key", signer.localSigner.privateKey)
    51	 *
    52	 * // If the backend sends an auth_url event, open that URL as a popup so the user can authorize the app
    53	 * signer.on("authUrl", (url) => { window.open(url, "auth", "width=600,height=600") })
    54	 *
    55	 * // wait until the signer is ready
    56	 * const loggedinUser = await signer.blockUntilReady()
    57	 *
    58	 * alert("You are now logged in as " + loggedinUser.npub)
    59	 */
    60	export class NDKNip46Signer extends EventEmitter implements NDKSigner {
    61	    private ndk: NDK;

    63

    65	     * The pubkey of the bunker that will be providing signatures
    66	     */

    68	
    69	    /**
    70	     * The pubkey of the user that events will be published as
    71	     */

    73	
    74	    get pubkey(): string {
    75	        if (!this.userPubkey) throw new Error("Not ready");
    76	        return this.userPubkey;
    77	    }
    78	
    79	    /**

    94	
    95	    /**

    99	
   100	    /**

   102	     * When set, operations that don't receive a response within this
   103	     * duration will reject with an NDKNip46TimeoutError.
   104	     * Set to `undefined` (the default) to disable timeouts.

   106	     * @example

   111	    /**

   119	     * // for nostrconnect:// flow
   120	     * const signer = NDKNip46Signer.nostrconnect(ndk, "wss://relay.example.com")

   125	     */
   126	    public constructor(
   127	        ndk: NDK,
   128	        userOrConnectionToken?: string | false,

   131	        nostrConnectOptions?: NostrConnectOptions,

   133	        super();
   134	
   135	        this.ndk = ndk;
   136	        this.debug = ndk.debug.extend("nip46:signer");
   137	        this.relayUrls = relayUrls;
   138	
   139	        if (!localSigner) {
   140	            this.localSigner = NDKPrivateKeySigner.generate();
   141	        } else {
   142	            if (typeof localSigner === "string") {
   143	                this.localSigner = new NDKPrivateKeySigner(localSigner);
   144	            } else {
   145	                this.localSigner = localSigner;
   146	            }
   147	        }

   149	        if (userOrConnectionToken === false) {
   150	        } else if (!userOrConnectionToken) {

   152	        } else if (userOrConnectionToken.startsWith("bunker://")) {
   153	            this.bunkerFlowInit(userOrConnectionToken);
   154	        } else {
   155	            this.nip05Init(userOrConnectionToken);
   156	        }

   161	    /**

   166	     */
   167	    static bunker(

   174	
   175	    /**

   189	
   190	    private nostrconnectFlowInit(nostrConnectOptions?: NostrConnectOptions) {

   203	
   204	    private bunkerFlowInit(connectionToken: string) {

   209	        const secret = bunkerUrl.searchParams.get("secret");

   213	        this.relayUrls = relayUrls;
   214	        this.secret = secret;
   215	    }
   216	
   217	    private nip05Init(nip05: string) {
   218	        this.nip05 = nip05;

   227	    private withTimeout<T>(promise: Promise<T>, operation: string): Promise<T> {
   228	        if (this.timeout === undefined) return promise;
   229

   531	
   532	    /**
   533	     * Serializes the signer's connection details and local signer state.
   534	     * @returns A JSON string containing the type, connection info, and local signer payload.
   535	     */
   536	    public toPayload(): string {
   537	        if (!this.bunkerPubkey || !this.userPubkey) {
   538	            throw new Error("NIP-46 signer is not fully initialized for serialization");
   539	        }
   540	
   541	        const payload = {
   542	            type: "nip46",
   543	            payload: {
   544	                bunkerPubkey: this.bunkerPubkey,
   545	                userPubkey: this.userPubkey,
   546	                relayUrls: this.relayUrls,
   547	                secret: this.secret,
   548	                localSignerPayload: this.localSigner.toPayload(),
   549	                // Store nip05 if it was used for initialization, otherwise null
   550	                nip05: this.nip05 || null,
   551	            },
   552	        };
   553	        return JSON.stringify(payload);
   554	    }
   555	
   556	    /**
   557	     * Deserializes the signer from a payload string.
   558	     * @param payloadString The JSON string obtained from toPayload().
   559	     * @param ndk The NDK instance, required for NIP-46.
   560	     * @returns An instance of NDKNip46Signer.
   561	     */
   562	    public static async fromPayload(payloadString: string, ndk: NDK): Promise<NDKNip46Signer> {
   563	        if (!ndk) {
   564	            throw new Error("NDK instance is required to deserialize NIP-46 signer");
   565	        }
   566	
   567	        const parsed = JSON.parse(payloadString);
   568	
   569	        if (parsed.type !== "nip46") {
   570	            throw new Error(`Invalid payload type: expected 'nip46', got ${parsed.type}`);
   571	        }
   572	
   573	        const payload = parsed.payload;
   574	
   575	        if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || !payload.localSignerPayload) {
   576	            throw new Error("Invalid payload content for nip46 signer");
   577	        }
   578	
   579	        // Deserialize the local signer first
   580	        const localSigner = await ndkSignerFromPayload(payload.localSignerPayload, ndk);
   581	        if (!localSigner) {
   582	            throw new Error("Failed to deserialize local signer for NIP-46");
   583	        }
   584	
   585	        if (!(localSigner instanceof NDKPrivateKeySigner)) {
   586	            throw new Error("Local signer must be an instance of NDKPrivateKeySigner");
   587	        }
   588	
   589	        let signer: NDKNip46Signer;
   590	
   591	        // Reconstruct based on whether nip05 was originally used
   592	        signer = new NDKNip46Signer(ndk, false, localSigner, payload.relayUrls);
   593	        signer.userPubkey = payload.userPubkey;
   594	        signer.bunkerPubkey = payload.bunkerPubkey;
   595	        signer.relayUrls = payload.relayUrls;
   596	        signer.secret = payload.secret;
   597	
   598	        // Ensure the _user property is set after deserialization
   599	        if (payload.userPubkey) {
   600	            signer._user = new NDKUser({ pubkey: payload.userPubkey });
   601	            if (signer._user) signer._user.ndk = ndk;
   602	        }
   603	
   604	        // Initialize the RPC subscription so that sign/encrypt/decrypt
   605	        // requests receive responses. Without this, operations hang
   606	        // indefinitely because no subscription is listening.
   607	        await signer.startListening();
   608	
   609	        return signer;
   610	    }
   611	}
   612	
   613	registerSigner("nip46", NDKNip46Signer);

    74	
    75	    /**

    79	     * @param value - The value to be encrypted.

    81	     */
    82	    async encrypt(recipient: NDKUser, value: string, scheme?: NDKEncryptionScheme): Promise<string> {

   116	                this.packageName,

   130	            )) as unknown as { result: string };

   249	    /**
   250	     * We start listening for events from the bunker
   251	     */
   252	    private async startListening() {
   253	        if (this.subscription) return;
   254	
   255	        const localUser = await this.localSigner.user();
   256	
   257	        if (!localUser) throw new Error("Local signer not ready");
   258	
   259	        this.subscription = await this.rpc.subscribe({
   260	            kinds: [NDKKind.NostrConnect],
   261	            "#p": [localUser.pubkey],
   262	        });
   263	    }
   264	
   265	    /**
   266	     * Get the user that is being published as
   267	     */
   268	    public async user(): Promise<NDKUser> {
   269	        // If user is already available, return it

   275

   279	        return this._user;
   280	    }
   281	
   282	    public async blockUntilReadyNostrConnect(): Promise<NDKUser> {
   283	        let removeHandler: (() => void) | undefined;

   285	        const promise = new Promise<NDKUser>((resolve, reject) => {
   286	            const connect = (response: NDKRpcResponse) => {
   287	                if (response.result === this.nostrConnectSecret) {
   288	                    // The response event pubkey is the bunker's pubkey, not the user's
   289	                    this.bunkerPubkey = response.event.pubkey;
   290	
   291	                    this.rpc.off("response", connect);
   292	                    removeHandler = undefined;
   293	
   294	                    // Get the actual user's pubkey from the bunker
   295	                    this.getPublicKey().then(async (pubkey) => {
   296	                        this.userPubkey = pubkey;
   297	                        this._user = this.ndk.getUser({ pubkey });
   298	                        await this.switchRelays();
   299	                        resolve(this._user);
   300	                    }).catch(reject);
   301	                }
   302	            };
   303	
   304	            removeHandler = () => this.rpc.off("response", connect);

    27	export class NDKNostrRpc extends EventEmitter {
    28	    private ndk: NDK;
    29	    private signer: NDKSigner;
    30	    private relaySet: NDKRelaySet | undefined;
    31	    private debug: debug.Debugger;
    32	    public encryptionType: "nip04" | "nip44" = "nip44";
    33	    private pool: NDKPool | undefined;
    34	
    35	    public constructor(ndk: NDK, signer: NDKSigner, debug: debug.Debugger, relayUrls?: string[]) {
    36	        super();
    37	        this.ndk = ndk;
    38	        this.signer = signer;
    39	
    40	        // if we have relays, we create a separate pool for it
    41	        if (relayUrls) {
    42	            this.pool = new NDKPool(relayUrls, ndk, {
    43	                debug: debug.extend("rpc-pool"),
    44	                name: "Nostr RPC",
    45	            });
    46	
    47	            this.relaySet = new NDKRelaySet(new Set(), ndk, this.pool);
    48	            for (const url of relayUrls) {
    49	                const relay = this.pool.getRelay(url, false, false);
    50	                relay.authPolicy = NDKRelayAuthPolicies.signIn({ ndk, signer, debug });
    51	                this.relaySet.addRelay(relay);
    52	                relay.connect();
    53	            }
    54	        }
    55	
    56	        this.debug = debug.extend("rpc");
    57	    }
    58	
    59	    /**
    60	     * Updates the relay set used for RPC communication.
    61	     * Disconnects from old relays and connects to new ones.
    62	     */
    63	    public updateRelays(relayUrls: string[]): void {
    64	        // Disconnect old pool
    65	        if (this.pool) {
    66	            for (const relay of this.pool.relays.values()) {
    67	                relay.disconnect();
    68	            }
    69	        }
    70	
    71	        this.pool = new NDKPool(relayUrls, this.ndk, {
    72	            debug: this.debug.extend("rpc-pool"),
    73	            name: "Nostr RPC",
    74	        });
    75	
    76	        this.relaySet = new NDKRelaySet(new Set(), this.ndk, this.pool);
    77	        for (const url of relayUrls) {
    78	            const relay = this.pool.getRelay(url, false, false);
    79	            relay.authPolicy = NDKRelayAuthPolicies.signIn({
    80	                ndk: this.ndk,
    81	                signer: this.signer,
    82	                debug: this.debug,
    83	            });
    84	            this.relaySet.addRelay(relay);
    85	            relay.connect();
    86	        }
    87	    }
    88	
    89	    /**
    90	     * Subscribe to a filter. This function will resolve once the subscription is ready.
    91	     */
    92	    public subscribe(filter: NDKFilter): Promise<NDKSubscription> {
    93	        return new Promise((resolve) => {
    94	            const sub = this.ndk.subscribe(filter, {
    95	                closeOnEose: false,
    96	                groupable: false,
    97	                cacheUsage: NDKSubscriptionCacheUsage.ONLY_RELAY,
    98	                pool: this.pool,
    99	                relaySet: this.relaySet,
   100	                onEvent: async (event: NDKEvent) => {
   101	                    try {
   102	                        const parsedEvent = await this.parseEvent(event);
   103	                        if ((parsedEvent as NDKRpcRequest).method) {
   104	                            this.emit("request", parsedEvent);
   105	                        } else {
   106	                            this.emit(`response-${parsedEvent.id}`, parsedEvent);
   107	                            this.emit("response", parsedEvent);
   108	                        }
   109	                    } catch (e) {
   110	                        this.debug("error parsing event", e, event.rawEvent());
   111	                    }
   112	                },
   113	                onEose: () => {
   114	                    this.debug("eosed");
   115	                    resolve(sub);
   116	                },
   117	            });
   118	        });
   119	    }
   120	
   121	    public async parseEvent(event: NDKEvent): Promise<NDKRpcRequest | NDKRpcResponse> {
   122	        // support both nip04 and nip44 encryption
   123	        if (this.encryptionType === "nip44" && event.content.includes("?iv=")) {
   124	            this.encryptionType = "nip04";
   125	        } else if (this.encryptionType === "nip04" && !event.content.includes("?iv=")) {
   126	            this.encryptionType = "nip44";
   127	        }
   128	
   129	        const remoteUser = this.ndk.getUser({ pubkey: event.pubkey });
   130	        remoteUser.ndk = this.ndk;
   131	        let decryptedContent: string;
   132	
   133	        try {
   134	            decryptedContent = await this.signer.decrypt(remoteUser, event.content, this.encryptionType);
   135	        } catch (_e) {
   136	            const otherEncryptionType = this.encryptionType === "nip04" ? "nip44" : "nip04";
   137	            decryptedContent = await this.signer.decrypt(remoteUser, event.content, otherEncryptionType);
   138	            this.encryptionType = otherEncryptionType;
   139	        }
   140	
   141	        const parsedContent = JSON.parse(decryptedContent);
   142	        const { id, method, params, result, error } = parsedContent;
   143	
   144	        if (method) {
   145	            return { id, pubkey: event.pubkey, method, params, event };
   146	        }
   147	        return { id, result, error, event };
   148	    }
   149	
   150	    public async sendResponse(
   151	        id: string,
   152	        remotePubkey: string,
   153	        result: string,
   154	        kind = NDKKind.NostrConnect,
   155	        error?: string,
   156	    ): Promise<void> {
   157	        const res = { id, result } as NDKRpcResponse;
   158	        if (error) {
   159	            res.error = error;
   160	        }
   161	
   162	        const localUser = await this.signer.user();
   163	        const remoteUser = this.ndk.getUser({ pubkey: remotePubkey });
   164	        const event = new NDKEvent(this.ndk, {
   165	            kind,
   166	            content: JSON.stringify(res),
   167	            tags: [["p", remotePubkey]],
   168	            pubkey: localUser.pubkey,
   169	        } as NostrEvent);
   170	
   171	        event.content = await this.signer.encrypt(remoteUser, event.content, this.encryptionType);
   172	        await event.sign(this.signer);
   173	        await event.publish(this.relaySet);
   174	    }
   175	
   176	    /**
   177	     * Sends a request.
   178	     * @param remotePubkey
   179	     * @param method
   180	     * @param params
   181	     * @param kind
   182	     * @param id
   183	     */
   184	    public async sendRequest(
   185	        remotePubkey: string,
   186	        method: string,
   187	        params: string[] = [],
   188	        kind = 24133,
   189	        cb?: (res: NDKRpcResponse) => void,
   190	    ): Promise<NDKRpcResponse> {
   191	        const id = Math.random().toString(36).substring(7);
   192	        const localUser = await this.signer.user();
   193	        const remoteUser = this.ndk.getUser({ pubkey: remotePubkey });
   194	        const request = { id, method, params };
   195	        const promise = new Promise<NDKRpcResponse>(() => {
   196	            const responseHandler = (response: NDKRpcResponse) => {
   197	                if (response.result === "auth_url") {
   198	                    this.once(`response-${id}`, responseHandler);
   199	                    this.emit("authUrl", response.error);
   200	                } else if (cb) {
   201	                    cb(response);
   202	                }
   203	            };
   204	
   205	            this.once(`response-${id}`, responseHandler);
   206	        });
   207	
   208	        const event = new NDKEvent(this.ndk, {
   209	            kind,
   210	            content: JSON.stringify(request),
   211	            tags: [["p", remotePubkey]],
   212	            pubkey: localUser.pubkey,
   213	        } as NostrEvent);
   214	
   215	        event.content = await this.signer.encrypt(remoteUser, event.content, this.encryptionType);
   216	        await event.sign(this.signer);
   217	        await event.publish(this.relaySet);
   218	
   219	        return promise;
   220	    }

     1	import { EventTemplate, NostrEvent } from "applesauce-core/helpers/event";
     2	import { Filter } from "applesauce-core/helpers/filter";
     3	import { ObservableInput } from "rxjs";
     4	
     5	export type ISigner = {
     6	  getPublicKey: () => Promise<string>;
     7	  signEvent: (template: EventTemplate) => Promise<NostrEvent>;
     8	  nip04?: {
     9	    encrypt: (pubkey: string, plaintext: string) => Promise<string>;
    10	    decrypt: (pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) => Promise<string>;
    11	  };
    12	  nip44?: {
    13	    encrypt: (pubkey: string, plaintext: string) => Promise<string>;
    14	    decrypt: (pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) => Promise<string>;
    15	  };
    16	};
    17	
    18	/** @deprecated Use ISigner instead */
    19	export type Nip07Interface = ISigner;
    20	
    21	/** A method used to subscribe to events on a set of relays */
    22	export type NostrSubscriptionMethod = (relays: string[], filters: Filter[]) => ObservableInput<NostrEvent | string>;
    23	
    24	/** A method used for publishing an event, can return a Promise that completes when published or an Observable that completes when published*/
    25	export type NostrPublishMethod = (relays: string[], event: NostrEvent) => Promise<any> | ObservableInput<any>;
    26	
    27	/** A simple pool type that combines the subscription and publish methods */
    28	export type NostrPool = {
    29	  subscription: NostrSubscriptionMethod;
    30	  publish: NostrPublishMethod;
    31	};
    32	
    33	/** Options for setting the subscription and publish methods */
    34	export type NostrConnectionMethodsOptions = {
    35	  /** An optional method for subscribing to relays */
    36	  subscriptionMethod?: NostrSubscriptionMethod;
    37	  /** An optional method for publishing events */
    38	  publishMethod?: NostrPublishMethod;
    39	  /** An optional pool for connection methods */
    40	  pool?: NostrPool;
    41	};
    42	
    43	/** A class that implements has global fallback methods for subscription and publish methods */
    44	export interface NostrConnectionClassMethods {
    45	  new (...args: any[]): any;
    46	  /** A fallback method to use for subscriptionMethod if none is passed in when creating the client */
    47	  subscriptionMethod: NostrSubscriptionMethod | undefined;
    48	  /** A fallback method to use for publishMethod if none is passed in when creating the client */
    49	  publishMethod: NostrPublishMethod | undefined;
    50	  /** A fallback pool to use if none is pass in when creating the signer */
    51	  pool: NostrPool | undefined;
    52	}
    53	
    54	/** Get the subscription and publish methods for a NostrConnect class */
    55	export function getConnectionMethods(
    56	  options: NostrConnectionMethodsOptions,
    57	  cls?: NostrConnectionClassMethods,
    58	): {
    59	  subscriptionMethod: NostrSubscriptionMethod;
    60	  publishMethod: NostrPublishMethod;
    61	} {
    62	  const subscriptionMethod =
    63	    options.subscriptionMethod ||
    64	    options.pool?.subscription.bind(options.pool) ||
    65	    cls?.subscriptionMethod ||
    66	    cls?.pool?.subscription.bind(cls.pool);
    67	  if (!subscriptionMethod)
    68	    throw new Error("Missing subscriptionMethod, either pass a method or set subscriptionMethod globally on the class");
    69	  const publishMethod =
    70	    options.publishMethod ||
    71	    options.pool?.publish.bind(options.pool) ||
    72	    cls?.publishMethod ||
    73	    cls?.pool?.publish.bind(cls.pool);
    74	  if (!publishMethod)
    75	    throw new Error("Missing publishMethod, either pass a method or set publishMethod globally on the class");
    76	
    77	  return {
    78	    subscriptionMethod,
    79	    publishMethod,
    80	  };
    81	}

     1	import { getEventHash, NostrEvent, UnsignedEvent } from "applesauce-core/helpers/event";
     2	import { ISigner } from "applesauce-signers";
