     6	
     7	/** Wraps a promise in an abort signal */
     8	function wrapInSignal<T>(promise: Promise<T>, signal: AbortSignal): Promise<T> {
     9	  return new Promise((res, rej) => {
    10	    signal.throwIfAborted();
    11	    let done = false;
    12	
    13	    // reject promise if abort signal is triggered
    14	    signal.addEventListener("abort", () => {
    15	      if (!done) rej(signal.reason || undefined);
    16	      done = true;
    17	    });
    18	
    19	    return promise.then(
    20	      (v) => {
    21	        if (!done) res(v);
    22	        done = true;
    23	      },
    24	      (err) => {
    25	        if (!done) rej(err);
    26	        done = true;
    27	      },
    28	    );
    29	  });
    30	}
    31	
    32	/** An error thrown when a signer is used with the wrong pubkey */
    33	export class SignerMismatchError extends Error {}
    34	
    35	/** A base class for all accounts */
    36	export class BaseAccount<Signer extends ISigner, SignerData, Metadata extends unknown> implements IAccount<
    37	  Signer,
    38	  SignerData,
    39	  Metadata
    40	> {
    41	  id = nanoid(8);
    42	
    43	  get type() {
    44	    const cls = Reflect.getPrototypeOf(this)!.constructor as IAccountConstructor<Signer, SignerData, Metadata>;
    45	    return cls.type;
    46	  }
    47	
    48	  /** Disable request queueing */
    49	  disableQueue?: boolean;
    50	
    51	  metadata$ = new BehaviorSubject<Metadata | undefined>(undefined);
    52	  get metadata(): Metadata | undefined {
    53	    return this.metadata$.value;
    54	  }
    55	  set metadata(metadata: Metadata) {
    56	    this.metadata$.next(metadata);
    57	  }
    58	
    59	  get nip04(): ISigner["nip04"] | undefined {
    60	    if (!this.signer.nip04) return undefined;
    61	    return {
    62	      encrypt: async (pubkey, plaintext) => this.operation(() => this.signer.nip04!.encrypt(pubkey, plaintext)),
    63	      decrypt: async (pubkey, plaintext) => this.operation(() => this.signer.nip04!.decrypt(pubkey, plaintext)),
    64	    };
    65	  }
    66	
    67	  get nip44(): ISigner["nip44"] | undefined {
    68	    if (!this.signer.nip44) return undefined;
    69	    return {
    70	      encrypt: async (pubkey, plaintext) => this.operation(() => this.signer.nip44!.encrypt(pubkey, plaintext)),
    71	      decrypt: async (pubkey, plaintext) => this.operation(() => this.signer.nip44!.decrypt(pubkey, plaintext)),
    72	    };
    73	  }
    74	
    75	  constructor(
    76	    public pubkey: string,
    77	    public signer: Signer,
    78	  ) {}
    79	
    80	  // This should be overwritten by a sub class
    81	  toJSON(): SerializedAccount<SignerData, Metadata> {
    82	    throw new Error("Not implemented");
    83	  }
    84	
    85	  /** A method that wraps any signer interaction, this allows the account to wait for unlock or queue requests */
    86	  protected operation<T extends unknown>(operation: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T> {
    87	    // If the queue is enabled, wait our turn in the queue
    88	    return this.waitForQueue(operation);
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  /** Adds the common fields to the serialized output of a toJSON method */
    92	  protected saveCommonFields(
    93	    json: Omit<SerializedAccount<SignerData, Metadata>, "id" | "type" | "metadata" | "pubkey">,
    94	  ): SerializedAccount<SignerData, Metadata> {
    95	    return { ...json, id: this.id, pubkey: this.pubkey, metadata: this.metadata, type: this.type };
    96	  }
    97	
    98	  /** Sets an accounts id and metadata. NOTE: This should only be used in fromJSON methods */
    99	  static loadCommonFields<T extends IAccount>(account: T, json: SerializedAccount<any, any>): T {
   100	    if (json.id) account.id = json.id;
   101	    if (json.metadata) account.metadata = json.metadata;
   102	    return account;
   103	  }
   104	
   105	  /** Gets the pubkey from the signer */
   106	  getPublicKey(): Promise<string> {
   107	    return this.operation(async () => {
   108	      const result = await this.signer.getPublicKey();
   109	      if (this.pubkey !== result) throw new SignerMismatchError("Account signer mismatch");
   110	      return result;
   111	    });
   112	  }
   113	
   114	  /** sign the event and make sure its signed with the correct pubkey */
   115	  signEvent(template: EventTemplate): Promise<NostrEvent> {
   116	    // If the template does not have a pubkey, set it to the accounts pubkey
   117	    if (!Reflect.has(template, "pubkey")) Reflect.set(template, "pubkey", this.pubkey);
   118	
   119	    return this.operation(async () => {
   120	      const id = getEventHash(template as UnsignedEvent);
   121	      const result = await this.signer.signEvent(template);
   122	
   123	      if (result.pubkey !== this.pubkey) throw new SignerMismatchError("Signer signed with wrong pubkey");
   124	      if (result.id !== id) throw new SignerMismatchError("Signer modified event");
   125	
   126	      return result;
   127	    });
   128	  }
   129	
   130	  /** Aborts all pending requests in the queue */
   131	  abortQueue(reason: Error) {
   132	    if (this.abort) this.abort.abort(reason);
   133	  }
   134	
   135	  /** internal queue */
   136	  protected queueLength = 0;
   137	  protected lock: Promise<any> | null = null;
   138	  protected abort: AbortController | null = null;
   139	  protected reduceQueue() {
   140	    // shorten the queue
   141	    this.queueLength--;
   142	
   143	    // if this was the last request, remove the lock
   144	    if (this.queueLength === 0) {
   145	      this.lock = null;
   146	      this.abort = null;
   147	    }
   148	  }
   149	  protected waitForQueue<T extends unknown>(operation: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T> {
   150	    if (this.disableQueue) return operation();
   151	
   152	    // if there is already a pending request, wait for it
   153	    if (this.lock && this.abort) {
   154	      // create a new promise that runs after the lock
   155	      const p = wrapInSignal(
   156	        this.lock.then(() => {
   157	          // if the abort signal is triggered, don't call the signer
   158	          this.abort?.signal.throwIfAborted();
   159	
   160	          return operation();
   161	        }),
   162	        this.abort.signal,
   163	      );
   164	
   165	      // set the lock the new promise that ignores errors
   166	      this.lock = p.catch(() => {}).finally(this.reduceQueue.bind(this));
   167	      this.queueLength++;
   168	
   169	      return p;
   170	    } else {
   171	      const result = operation();
   172	
   173	      // if the result is async, set the new lock
   174	      if (result instanceof Promise) {
   175	        this.abort = new AbortController();
   176	
   177	        const p = wrapInSignal(result, this.abort.signal);
   178	
   179	        // set the lock the new promise that ignores errors
   180	        this.lock = p.catch(() => {}).finally(this.reduceQueue.bind(this));
   181	        this.queueLength = 1;
   182	      }
   183	
   184	      return result;
   185	    }
   186	  }
   187	}

     1	import { ISigner } from "applesauce-signers";
     2	import { BehaviorSubject } from "rxjs";
     3	
     4	import { IAccount, IAccountConstructor, SerializedAccount } from "./types.js";
     5	import { ProxySigner } from "./proxy-signer.js";
     6	
     7	export class AccountManager<Metadata extends unknown = any> {
     8	  types = new Map<string, IAccountConstructor<any, any, Metadata>>();
     9	
    10	  active$ = new BehaviorSubject<IAccount<any, any, Metadata> | undefined>(undefined);
    11	  get active() {
    12	    return this.active$.value;
    13	  }
    14	
    15	  accounts$ = new BehaviorSubject<IAccount<any, any, Metadata>[]>([]);
    16	  get accounts() {
    17	    return this.accounts$.value;
    18	  }
    19	
    20	  /** Proxy signer for currently active account */
    21	  signer: ISigner;
    22	
    23	  /** Disable request queueing for any accounts added to this manager */
    24	  disableQueue?: boolean;
    25	
    26	  constructor() {
    27	    this.signer = new ProxySigner(this.active$, "No active account");
    28	  }
    29	
    30	  // Account type CRUD
    31	
    32	  /** Add account type class */
    33	  registerType<S extends ISigner>(accountType: IAccountConstructor<S, any, Metadata>) {
    34	    if (!accountType.type) throw new Error(`Account class missing static "type" field`);
    35	    if (this.types.has(accountType.type)) throw new Error(`An account type of ${accountType.type} already exists`);
    36	    this.types.set(accountType.type, accountType);
    37	  }
    38	
    39	  /** Remove account type */
    40	  unregisterType(type: string) {
    41	    this.types.delete(type);
    42	  }
    43	
    44	  // Accounts CRUD
    45	
    46	  /** gets an account in the manager */
    47	  getAccount<Signer extends ISigner>(
    48	    id: string | IAccount<Signer, any, Metadata>,
    49	  ): IAccount<Signer, any, Metadata> | undefined {
    50	    if (typeof id === "string") return this.accounts$.value.find((a) => a.id === id);
    51	    else if (this.accounts$.value.includes(id)) return id;
    52	    else return undefined;
    53	  }
    54	
    55	  /** Return the first account for a pubkey */
    56	  getAccountForPubkey(pubkey: string): IAccount<any, any, Metadata> | undefined {
    57	    return Object.values(this.accounts$.value).find((account) => account.pubkey === pubkey);
    58	  }
    59	
    60	  /** Returns all accounts for a pubkey */
    61	  getAccountsForPubkey(pubkey: string): IAccount<any, any, Metadata>[] {
    62	    return Object.values(this.accounts$.value).filter((account) => account.pubkey === pubkey);
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  /** adds an account to the manager */
    66	  addAccount(account: IAccount<any, any, Metadata>) {
    67	    if (this.getAccount(account.id)) return;
    68	
    69	    // copy the disableQueue flag only if its set
    70	    if (this.disableQueue !== undefined && account.disableQueue !== undefined) {
    71	      account.disableQueue = this.disableQueue;
    72	    }
    73	
    74	    this.accounts$.next([...this.accounts$.value, account]);
    75	  }
    76	
    77	  /** Removes an account from the manager */
    78	  removeAccount(account: string | IAccount<any, any, Metadata>) {
    79	    const id = typeof account === "string" ? account : account.id;
    80	    this.accounts$.next(this.accounts$.value.filter((a) => a.id !== id));
    81	
    82	    // if the removed account was active, clear the active account
    83	    if (this.active$.value?.id === id) this.active$.next(undefined);
    84	  }
    85	
    86	  /** Replaces an account with another */
    87	  replaceAccount(old: string | IAccount<any, any, Metadata>, account: IAccount<any, any, Metadata>) {
    88	    this.addAccount(account);
    89	
    90	    // if the old account was active, switch to the new one
    91	    const id = typeof account === "string" ? account : account.id;
    92	    if (this.active$.value?.id === id) this.setActive(account);
    93	
    94	    this.removeAccount(old);
    95	  }
    96	
    97	  // Active account methods
    98	
    99	  /** Returns the currently active account */
   100	  getActive() {
   101	    return this.active$.value;
   102	  }
   103	  /** Sets the currently active account */
   104	  setActive(id: string | IAccount<any, any, Metadata>) {
   105	    const account = this.getAccount(id);
   106	    if (!account) throw new Error("Cant find account with that ID");
   107	
   108	    if (this.active$.value?.id !== account.id) {
   109	      this.active$.next(account);
   110	    }
   111	  }
   112	  /** Clears the currently active account */
   113	  clearActive() {
   114	    this.active$.next(undefined);
   115	  }
   116	
   117	  // Metadata CRUD
   118	
   119	  /** sets the metadata on an account */
   120	  setAccountMetadata(id: string | IAccount<any, any, Metadata>, metadata: Metadata) {
   121	    const account = this.getAccount(id);
   122	    if (!account) throw new Error("Cant find account with that ID");
   123	    account.metadata = metadata;
   124	  }
   125	
   126	  /** sets the metadata on an account */
   127	  getAccountMetadata(id: string | IAccount<any, any, Metadata>): Metadata | undefined {
   128	    const account = this.getAccount(id);
   129	    if (!account) throw new Error("Cant find account with that ID");
   130	    return account.metadata;
   131	  }
   132	
   133	  /** Removes all metadata on the account */
   134	  clearAccountMetadata(id: string | IAccount<any, any, Metadata>) {
   135	    const account = this.getAccount(id);
   136	    if (!account) throw new Error("Cant find account with that ID");
   137	    account.metadata = undefined;
   138	  }
   139	
   140	  // Serialize / Deserialize
   141	
   142	  /** Returns an array of serialized accounts */
   143	  toJSON(quite = false): SerializedAccount<any, Metadata>[] {
   144	    const accounts: SerializedAccount<any, Metadata>[] = [];
   145	
   146	    for (const account of this.accounts) {
   147	      try {
   148	        accounts.push(account.toJSON());
   149	      } catch (error) {
   150	        if (!quite) throw error;
   151	      }
   152	    }
   153	
   154	    return accounts;
   155	  }
   156	
   157	  /**
   158	   * Restores all accounts from an array of serialized accounts
   159	   * NOTE: this will clear all existing accounts
   160	   */
   161	  fromJSON(accounts: SerializedAccount<any, Metadata>[], quite = false) {
   162	    for (const json of accounts) {
   163	      try {
   164	        const AccountType = this.types.get(json.type);
   165	
   166	        if (!AccountType) {
   167	          if (!quite) throw new Error(`Missing account type ${json.type}`);
   168	          else continue;
   169	        }
   170	
   171	        const account = AccountType.fromJSON(json);
   172	        this.addAccount(account);
   173	      } catch (error) {
   174	        if (!quite) throw error;
   175	        else console.log(`Failed to load account`, error);
   176	      }
   177	    }
   178	  }
   179	
   180	  /** Create an account from a types array and a serialized account */
   181	  static deserialize<
   182	    Signer extends ISigner = ISigner,
   183	    SignerData extends unknown = any,
   184	    Metadata extends unknown = any,
   185	  >(
   186	    types: IAccountConstructor<any, any, any>[],
   187	    json: SerializedAccount<SignerData, Metadata>,
   188	  ): IAccount<Signer, SignerData, Metadata> {
   189	    const account = types.find((type) => type.type === json.type)?.fromJSON(json);
   190	    if (!account) throw new Error(`Missing account type ${json.type}`);
   191	    return account;
   192	  }
   193	}

     4	
     5	/** A signer class that proxies requests to another signer that isn't created yet */
     6	export class ProxySigner<T extends ISigner> implements ISigner {
     7	  private _signer: T | undefined;
     8	  protected get signer(): T {
     9	    if (!this._signer) throw new Error(this.error || "Missing signer");
    10	    return this._signer;
    11	  }
    12	
    13	  get nip04() {
    14	    if (!this.signer.nip04) throw new Error("Signer does not support nip04");
    15	    return this.signer.nip04;
    16	  }
    17	
    18	  get nip44() {
    19	    if (!this.signer.nip44) throw new Error("Signer does not support nip44");
    20	    return this.signer.nip44;
    21	  }
    22	
    23	  constructor(
    24	    protected upstream: Observable<T | undefined>,
    25	    protected error?: string,
    26	  ) {
    27	    this.upstream.subscribe((signer) => (this._signer = signer));
    28	  }
    29	
    30	  async signEvent(template: EventTemplate): Promise<NostrEvent> {
    31	    return this.signer.signEvent(template);
    32	  }
    33	  async getPublicKey(): Promise<string> {
    34	    return this.signer.getPublicKey();
    35	  }
    36	}

     6	import { PrivateKeyAccount } from "./private-key-account.js";
     7	
     8	/** Registers the most common account types to a account manager */
     9	export function registerCommonAccountTypes(manager: AccountManager) {
    10	  manager.registerType(ExtensionAccount);
    11	  manager.registerType(PasswordAccount);
    12	  manager.registerType(ReadonlyAccount);
    13	  manager.registerType(PrivateKeyAccount);
    14	  manager.registerType(NostrConnectAccount);

     1	import { bytesToHex, hexToBytes } from "applesauce-core/helpers/event";
     2	import { NostrConnectSigner, PrivateKeySigner } from "applesauce-signers";
     3	import { BaseAccount } from "../account.js";
     4	import { SerializedAccount } from "../types.js";
     5	
     6	export type NostrConnectAccountSignerData = {
     7	  clientKey: string;
     8	  remote: string;
     9	  relays: string[];
    10	};
    11	
    12	/** An account type for NIP-46 signers */
    13	export class NostrConnectAccount<Metadata extends unknown = unknown> extends BaseAccount<
    14	  NostrConnectSigner,
    15	  NostrConnectAccountSignerData,
    16	  Metadata
    17	> {
    18	  static readonly type = "nostr-connect";
    19	
    20	  toJSON(): SerializedAccount<NostrConnectAccountSignerData, Metadata> {
    21	    if (!this.signer.remote) throw new Error("Cant save NostrConnectAccount when not initialized");
    22	
    23	    return super.saveCommonFields({
    24	      signer: {
    25	        clientKey: bytesToHex(this.signer.signer.key),
    26	        remote: this.signer.remote,
    27	        relays: this.signer.relays,
    28	      },
    29	    });
    30	  }
    31	
    32	  static fromJSON<Metadata extends unknown = unknown>(
    33	    json: SerializedAccount<NostrConnectAccountSignerData, Metadata>,
    34	  ): NostrConnectAccount<Metadata> {
    35	    const signer = new NostrConnectSigner({
    36	      relays: json.signer.relays,
    37	      pubkey: json.pubkey,
    38	      remote: json.signer.remote,
    39	      signer: new PrivateKeySigner(hexToBytes(json.signer.clientKey)),
    40	    });
    41	
    42	    const account = new NostrConnectAccount<Metadata>(json.pubkey, signer);
    43	    return super.loadCommonFields(account, json);
    44	  }
    45	}

    66	};
    67	export type NostrConnectResponse<N extends NostrConnectMethod> = {

    76	};
    77	
    78	/** A bunker:// URI */
    79	export type BunkerURI = {
    80	  remote: string;
    81	  relays: string[];
    82	  secret?: string;
    83	};
    84	
    85	/** Parse a bunker:// URI */
    86	export function parseBunkerURI(uri: string): BunkerURI {
    87	  const url = new URL(uri);
    88	
    89	  // firefox puts pubkey part in host, chrome puts pubkey in pathname
    90	  const remote = url.host || url.pathname.replace("//", "");
    91	  if (!isHexKey(remote)) throw new Error("Invalid bunker URI: remote is not a valid hex key");
    92	
    93	  const relays = url.searchParams.getAll("relay");
    94	  if (relays.length === 0) throw new Error("Invalid bunker URI: missing relays");
    95	  const secret = url.searchParams.get("secret") ?? undefined;
    96	
    97	  return { remote, relays, secret };
    98	}
    99	
   100	/** Creates a bunker:// URI from a {@link BunkerURI} object */
   101	export function createBunkerURI(data: BunkerURI): string {
   102	  const url = new URL(`bunker://${data.remote}`);
   103	  data.relays.forEach((relay) => url.searchParams.append("relay", relay));
   104	  if (data.secret) url.searchParams.set("secret", data.secret);
   105	  return url.toString();
   106	}
   107	
   108	/** App metadata for a nostrconnect:// URI */
   109	export type NostrConnectAppMetadata = {
   110	  /** The name of the client */
   111	  name?: string;
   112	  /** An image for the client */
   113	  image?: string;
   114	  /** The url of the client */
   115	  url?: string | URL;
   116	  /** The permissions the client has */
   117	  permissions?: string[];
   118	};
   119	
   120	/** A nostrconnect:// URI */
   121	export type NostrConnectURI = {
   122	  /** The pubkey of the client */
   123	  client: string;
   124	  /** The secret used by the signer to connect to the client */
   125	  secret: string;
   126	  /** The relays used to communicate with the remote signer */
   127	  relays: string[];
   128	  /** The metadata of the client */
   129	  metadata?: NostrConnectAppMetadata;
   130	};
   131	
   132	/** Parse a nostrconnect:// URI */
   133	export function parseNostrConnectURI(uri: string): NostrConnectURI {
   134	  const url = new URL(uri);
   135	  const client = url.host || url.pathname.replace("//", "");
   136	  if (!isHexKey(client)) throw new Error("Invalid nostrconnect URI: client is not a valid hex key");
   137	
   138	  const secret = url.searchParams.get("secret");
   139	  const relays = url.searchParams.getAll("relay");
   140	  if (!secret) throw new Error("Invalid nostrconnect URI: missing secret");
   141	  if (relays.length === 0) throw new Error("Invalid nostrconnect URI: missing relays");
   142	
   143	  const metadata: NostrConnectAppMetadata = {
   144	    name: url.searchParams.get("name") ?? undefined,
   145	    image: url.searchParams.get("image") ?? undefined,
   146	    url: url.searchParams.get("url") ?? undefined,
   147	    permissions: url.searchParams.get("perms")?.split(",") ?? undefined,
   148	  };
   149	
   150	  /** Omit metadata if all values are undefined */
   151	  if (Object.values(metadata).every((v) => v === undefined)) return { client, secret, relays };
   152	  else return { client, secret, relays, metadata };
   153	}
   154	
   155	/** Create a nostrconnect:// URI from a {@link NostrConnectURI} object */
   156	export function createNostrConnectURI(data: NostrConnectURI): string {
   157	  const params = new URLSearchParams();
   158	
   159	  params.set("secret", data.secret);
   160	  if (data.metadata?.name) params.set("name", data.metadata.name);
   161	  if (data.metadata?.url) params.set("url", String(data.metadata.url));
   162	  if (data.metadata?.image) params.set("image", data.metadata.image);
   163	  if (data.metadata?.permissions) params.set("perms", data.metadata.permissions.join(","));
   164	  for (const relay of data.relays) params.append("relay", relay);
   165	
   166	  return `nostrconnect://${data.client}?` + params.toString();
   167	}
   168	
   169	/** Build an array of signing permissions for event kinds */
   170	export function buildSigningPermissions(kinds: number[]): string[] {
   171	  return [Permission.GetPublicKey, ...kinds.map((k) => `${Permission.SignEvent}:${k}`)];
   172	}

    33	}
    34	
    35	export type NostrConnectSignerOptions = NostrConnectionMethodsOptions & {
    36	  /** The relays to communicate over */
    37	  relays: string[];
    38	  /** A {@link PrivateKeySigner} for this client */
    39	  signer?: PrivateKeySigner;
    40	  /** pubkey of the remote signer application */
    41	  remote?: string;
    42	  /** Users pubkey */
    43	  pubkey?: string;
    44	  /** A secret used when initalizing the connection from the client side */
    45	  secret?: string;
    46	  /** A method for handling "auth" requests */
    47	  onAuth?: (url: string) => Promise<void>;
    48	};
    49	
    50	export class NostrConnectSigner implements ISigner {
    51	  /** A fallback method to use for subscriptionMethod if none is pass in when creating the signer */
    52	  static subscriptionMethod: NostrSubscriptionMethod | undefined = undefined;
    53	  /** A fallback method to use for publishMethod if none is pass in when creating the signer */
    54	  static publishMethod: NostrPublishMethod | undefined = undefined;
    55	  /** A fallback pool to use if none is pass in when creating the signer */
    56	  static pool: NostrPool | undefined = undefined;
    57	
    58	  /** A method that is called when an event needs to be published */
    59	  protected publishMethod: NostrPublishMethod;
    60	  /** The active nostr subscription */
    61	  protected subscriptionMethod: NostrSubscriptionMethod;
    62	
    63	  protected log = logger.extend("NostrConnectSigner");
    64	  /** The local client signer */
    65	  public signer: PrivateKeySigner;
    66	
    67	  /** Whether the signer is listening for events */
    68	  listening = false;
    69	
    70	  /** Whether the signer is connected to the remote signer */
    71	  isConnected = false;
    72	
    73	  /** The users pubkey */
    74	  protected pubkey?: string;
    75	  /** Relays to communicate over */
    76	  relays: string[];
    77	  /** The remote signer pubkey */
    78	  remote?: string;
    79	
    80	  /** Client pubkey */
    81	  get clientPubkey() {
    82	    return getPublicKey(this.signer.key);
    83	  }
    84	
    85	  /** A method for handling "auth" requests */
    86	  public onAuth: (url: string) => Promise<void> = defaultHandleAuth;
    87	
    88	  verifyEvent: typeof verifyEvent = verifyEvent;
    89	
    90	  /** A secret used when initiating a connection from the client side */
    91	  public secret: string;
    92	
    93	  nip04?:
    94	    | {
    95	        encrypt: (pubkey: string, plaintext: string) => Promise<string>;
    96	        decrypt: (pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) => Promise<string>;
    97	      }
    98	    | undefined;
    99	  nip44?:
   100	    | {
   101	        encrypt: (pubkey: string, plaintext: string) => Promise<string>;
   102	        decrypt: (pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) => Promise<string>;
   103	      }
   104	    | undefined;
   105	
   106	  constructor(options: NostrConnectSignerOptions) {
   107	    this.relays = options.relays;
   108	    this.pubkey = options.pubkey;
   109	    this.remote = options.remote;
   110	    this.secret = options.secret || nanoid(12);
   111	
   112	    // Get the subscription and publish methods
   113	    const { subscriptionMethod, publishMethod } = getConnectionMethods(options, NostrConnectSigner);
   114	
   115	    // Use arrow functions so "this" isn't bound to the signer
   116	    this.subscriptionMethod = (relays, filters) => subscriptionMethod(relays, filters);
   117	    this.publishMethod = (relays, event) => publishMethod(relays, event);
   118	
   119	    if (options.onAuth) this.onAuth = options.onAuth;
   120	
   121	    // Get or create the local signer
   122	    this.signer = options?.signer || new PrivateKeySigner();

   124	    this.nip04 = {
   125	      encrypt: this.nip04Encrypt.bind(this),
   126	      decrypt: this.nip04Decrypt.bind(this),
   127	    };
   128	    this.nip44 = {
   129	      encrypt: this.nip44Encrypt.bind(this),
   130	      decrypt: this.nip44Decrypt.bind(this),
   131	    };
   132	  }
   133	
   134	  /** The currently active REQ subscription */
   135	  protected req?: Subscription;
   136	
   137	  /** Open the connection */
   138	  async open() {
   139	    if (this.listening) return;
   140	
   141	    this.listening = true;
   142	    const pubkey = await this.signer.getPublicKey();
   143	
   144	    // Setup subscription
   145	    this.req = from(
   146	      this.subscriptionMethod(this.relays, [
   147	        {
   148	          kinds: [kinds.NostrConnect],
   149	          "#p": [pubkey],
   150	        },
   151	      ]),
   152	    )
   153	      .pipe(
   154	        // Keep the connection open indefinitely
   155	        repeat(),
   156	        // Retry on connection failure
   157	        retry(),
   158	        // Ignore strings (support for applesauce-relay)
   159	        filter((event) => typeof event !== "string"),
   160	      )
   161	      .subscribe(this.handleEvent.bind(this));
   162	
   163	    this.log("Opened", this.relays);
   164	  }
   165	
   166	  /** Close the connection */
   167	  async close() {
   168	    this.listening = false;
   169	    this.isConnected = false;
   170	
   171	    // Close the current subscription
   172	    if (this.req) {
   173	      this.req.unsubscribe();
   174	      this.req = undefined;
   175	    }
   176	
   177	    // Cancel waiting promise
   178	    if (this.waitingPromise) {
   179	      this.waitingPromise.reject(new Error("Closed"));
   180	      this.waitingPromise = null;
   181	    }
   182	
   183	    this.log("Closed");
   184	  }

   187	  protected auths = new Set<string>();

   404	  async ping() {

   407	  }
   408	
   409	  /**
   410	   * Request relay list from the remote signer
   411	   * @returns An array of relay URLs if the signer wants to switch relays, or null if no change
   412	   */
   413	  async switchRelays(): Promise<string[] | null> {
   414	    await this.requireConnection();
   415	    const result = await this.makeRequest(NostrConnectMethod.SwitchRelays, []);
   416	
   417	    // Update local relays if the remote signer provided new ones
   418	    if (result !== null && Array.isArray(result) && result.length > 0) {
   419	      this.log("Switching relays from", this.relays, "to", result);
   420	      this.relays = result;
   421	
   422	      // Restart subscription with new relays
   423	      if (this.listening) {
   424	        await this.close();
   425	        await this.open();
   426	      }
   427	    }
   428	
   429	    return result;
   430	  }

   432	  /** Returns the nostrconnect:// URI for this signer */
   433	  getNostrConnectURI(metadata?: NostrConnectAppMetadata) {
   434	    return createNostrConnectURI({
   435	      client: getPublicKey(this.signer.key),
   436	      secret: this.secret,
   437	      relays: this.relays,
   438	      metadata,
   439	    });

   448	  static buildSigningPermissions(kinds: number[]) {

   450	  }
   451	
   452	  /** Create a {@link NostrConnectSigner} from a bunker:// URI */
   453	  static async fromBunkerURI(
   454	    uri: string,
   455	    options?: Omit<NostrConnectSignerOptions, "relays"> & { permissions?: string[]; signer?: PrivateKeySigner },
   456	  ) {
   457	    const { remote, relays, secret } = NostrConnectSigner.parseBunkerURI(uri);
   458	
   459	    const client = new NostrConnectSigner({ relays, remote, ...options });
   460	    await client.connect(secret, options?.permissions);
   461	
   462	    return client;
   463	  }

     1	import { isHexKey } from "applesauce-core/helpers";
     2	import { EventTemplate, VerifiedEvent, verifyEvent } from "applesauce-core/helpers/event";
     3	import { ISigner } from "../interop.js";
     4	
     5	/** AN error that is throw when the window.nostr extension is missing */
     6	export class ExtensionMissingError extends Error {}
     7	
     8	/** A signer that is a proxy for window.nostr */
     9	export class ExtensionSigner implements ISigner {
    10	  get nip04() {
    11	    return window.nostr?.nip04;
    12	  }
    13	  get nip44() {
    14	    return window.nostr?.nip44;
    15	  }
    16	
    17	  protected pubkey: string | undefined = undefined;
    18	
    19	  async getPublicKey() {
    20	    if (!window.nostr) throw new ExtensionMissingError("Signer extension missing");
    21	    if (this.pubkey) return this.pubkey;
    22	
    23	    const key = await window.nostr.getPublicKey();
    24	
    25	    if (!isHexKey(key)) throw new Error("Extension returned an invalid public key");
    26	    this.pubkey = key;
    27	    return this.pubkey;
    28	  }
    29	
    30	  async signEvent(template: EventTemplate): Promise<VerifiedEvent> {
    31	    if (!window.nostr) throw new ExtensionMissingError("Signer extension missing");
    32	    const event = await window.nostr.signEvent(template);
    33	    if (!verifyEvent(event)) throw new Error("Extension returned an invalid event");
    34	    return event;
    35	  }
    36	}

     1	import {
     2	  EventTemplate,
     3	  getEventHash,
     4	  normalizeToPubkey,
     5	  NostrEvent,
     6	  npubEncode,
     7	  UnsignedEvent,
     8	  verifyEvent,
     9	} from "applesauce-core/helpers";
    10	import { nanoid } from "nanoid";
    11	import { NostrSignerPlugin, Permission } from "nostr-signer-capacitor-plugin";
    12	import { ISigner } from "../interop.js";
    13	
    14	export class AndroidNativeSigner implements ISigner {
    15	  packageName: string;
    16	  connected = false;
    17	
    18	  permissions: Permission[] = [];
    19	
    20	  private pubkey: string | null = null;
    21	  verifyEvent: typeof verifyEvent = verifyEvent;
    22	
    23	  nip04: {
    24	    encrypt: (pubkey: string, plaintext: string) => Promise<string>;
    25	    decrypt: (pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) => Promise<string>;
    26	  };
    27	  nip44: {
    28	    encrypt: (pubkey: string, plaintext: string) => Promise<string>;
    29	    decrypt: (pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) => Promise<string>;
    30	  };
    31	
    32	  constructor(packageName: string) {
    33	    this.packageName = packageName;
    34	
    35	    this.nip04 = {
    36	      encrypt: this.nip04Encrypt.bind(this),
    37	      decrypt: this.nip04Decrypt.bind(this),
    38	    };
    39	    this.nip44 = {
    40	      encrypt: this.nip44Encrypt.bind(this),
    41	      decrypt: this.nip44Decrypt.bind(this),
    42	    };
    43	  }
    44	
    45	  static async getSignerApps() {
    46	    return (await NostrSignerPlugin.getInstalledSignerApps()).apps;
    47	  }
    48	
    49	  async setup() {
    50	    if (this.connected) return;
    51	
    52	    await NostrSignerPlugin.setPackageName(this.packageName);
    53	
    54	    const result = await NostrSignerPlugin.getPublicKey(this.packageName, this.permissions);
    55	
    56	    const pubkey = normalizeToPubkey(result.npub);
    57	    if (!pubkey) throw new Error("Invalid public key");
    58	    this.pubkey = pubkey;
    59	
    60	    this.connected = true;
    61	  }
    62	
    63	  async getPublicKey() {
    64	    await this.setup();
    65	    return this.pubkey!;
    66	  }
    67	  async signEvent(template: UnsignedEvent | EventTemplate) {
    68	    const pubkey = await this.getPublicKey();
    69	
    70	    // add pubkey to template
    71	    const withPubkey: UnsignedEvent = {
    72	      ...template,
    73	      pubkey: pubkey,
    74	    };
    75	
    76	    // calculate the event id
    77	    const unsigned = {
    78	      ...withPubkey,
    79	      id: getEventHash(withPubkey),
    80	      // plugin requires an empty sig field
    81	      sig: "",
    82	    };
    83	
    84	    // request signature
    85	    const result = await NostrSignerPlugin.signEvent(
    86	      this.packageName,
    87	      JSON.stringify(unsigned),
    88	      unsigned.id,
    89	      npubEncode(unsigned.pubkey),
    90	    );
    91	
    92	    const signed: NostrEvent = { ...unsigned, id: result.id, sig: result.signature };
    93	    if (!this.verifyEvent(signed)) throw new Error("Invalid signature");
    94	
    95	    return signed;
    96	  }
    97	
    98	  // NIP-04
    99	  async nip04Encrypt(pubkey: string, plaintext: string) {
   100	    const p = await this.getPublicKey();
   101	    const result = await NostrSignerPlugin.nip04Encrypt(this.packageName, plaintext, nanoid(), pubkey, npubEncode(p));
   102	    return result.result;
   103	  }
   104	  async nip04Decrypt(pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) {
   105	    const p = await this.getPublicKey();
   106	    const result = await NostrSignerPlugin.nip04Decrypt(this.packageName, ciphertext, nanoid(), pubkey, npubEncode(p));
   107	    return result.result;
   108	  }
   109	
   110	  // NIP-44
   111	  async nip44Encrypt(pubkey: string, plaintext: string) {
   112	    const p = await this.getPublicKey();
   113	    const result = await NostrSignerPlugin.nip44Encrypt(this.packageName, plaintext, nanoid(), pubkey, npubEncode(p));
   114	    return result.result;
   115	  }
   116	  async nip44Decrypt(pubkey: string, ciphertext: string) {
   117	    const p = await this.getPublicKey();
   118	    const result = await NostrSignerPlugin.nip44Decrypt(this.packageName, ciphertext, nanoid(), pubkey, npubEncode(p));
   119	    return result.result;
   120	  }
   121	}
